programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: (MA) The 1964 murder of 9-year-old Marise Chiverella terrifies Hazelton. After years of dead ends, a student working as a genetic genealogist reignites the case.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: (M) In what looks like a planned ambush, a young man turns up dead in his garage. Police must look into a romance gone wrong to find his killer, and the child that the two may share.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: (M) A woman shocks the Titus County Sheriff's Office when she reports the kidnapping of her husband. Police race to find him, but they must first figure out who is telling the truth.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
